content_markdown:
# Echoes of Eternity in the Cosmic Silence
## Scripture
"The heavens declare the glory of God; and the firmament shows His handiwork." - Psalm 19:1 is a well-known passage, but let's look at a different one: "He has made everything beautiful in its time. He has also set eternity in the human heart; yet no one can fathom what God has done from beginning to end." - Ecclesiastes 3:11

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're met with an profound silence. The stars and galaxies twinkling above us don't make a sound, yet they speak volumes about God's character. The vast expanse of space can be overwhelming, but it's in this silence that we're reminded of God's eternal nature. He has set eternity in our hearts, giving us a sense of longing for something more, something beyond this temporal life. The celestial bodies above us are a testament to God's handiwork, a beauty that transcends time and space.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we stand in awe of the night sky, we're reminded of Your eternal nature. Help us to grasp the beauty and wonder of Your creation, and to understand the eternity You've set in our hearts. May we find comfort in the silence of the cosmos, knowing that You are the One who has made everything beautiful in its time. Guide us as we navigate the complexities of life, and may we always look to You, the Author of eternity, for wisdom and peace.
